failure_asset.next_boundary: do not retry this intraday VWAP repricing pressure surface with simple score thresholds, VWAP-band tweaks, stop, target, hold, activity, spread, capital, or retry nudges; next work should use synthesis because the post-SC0005 ingredient count is now sufficient
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: proxy was strongly negative, aggregate MT5 tick was negative, and all nine fold-isolated MT5 tick folds lost; worst fold rw_009 net PnL was -71.05 and max drawdown was 14.298 percent

supporting_lessons.summary: daily anchored VWAP repricing pressure rank met target activity but lost all nine rolling-window OOS folds; total tick net PnL was -452.75 and worst fold rw_009 net PnL was -71.05
schedule replay logic parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so failure is hypothesis quality and execution behavior rather than proxy-to-EA schedule mismatch
tick execution was better than closed-bar logic in all nine folds by 132.19 total net PnL, but every fold still lost and no candidate quality was rescued
